name: Roasted Prawns c Spinach Mashed Potatoes & Re
recipeIngredient: 3 medium red bell peppers (roasted, peeled, seeded, and chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Season the prawns with olive oil and seasonings. In a hot skillet, sear the prawns on one side for 1 minute. Place the prawns in the oven and roast for 6-8 minutes or until done.
3. For the potatoes: Combine diced potatoes and salted water in a saucepot. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and cook until tender (about 8-10 minutes). Remove from heat and drain.
4. In another saucepot, bring heavy cream to a boil and remove from heat. Process the spinach with hot cream until smooth. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Return potatoes to stove; add blended spinach mixture and butter. Mash with potato masher until fairly smooth. Season with salt and pepper.
6. For the sauce: Heat remaining olive oil in a pan. Add roasted peppers, onions, garlic, basil, and cayenne. Cook for 3 minutes. Stir in stock and heavy cream, then bring to boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 8 minutes. Puree sauce with handheld blender until smooth.
7. Spoon sauce over the center of platter. Arrange potatoes in center; surround with prawns. Garnish with fried spinach and seasonings.
